mechanics.excerpt: Federated Long Rifle: The Federated Industries Iong rifle was originally designed and manufactured for the armed forces of the Federated Suns, but has since been copied by each of the other Successor States Zeus Heavy Rifle: The Zeus was designed torstopping power.
